title: GlobalRAG: A Reinforcement Learning Framework for Global Reasoning in Multi-hop QA
task: reinforcement learning for reasoning and retrieval

defines.name: GlobalRAG
defines.definition: A reinforcement learning framework that improves global reasoning in multi-hop QA by decomposing questions into subgoals and coordinating retrieval with reasoning.

problem: Existing RL-based RAG methods lack global planning and faithful execution, which limits multi-step reasoning in multi-hop question answering.
